{"acceptance_criteria":["README.md contains Installation, Usage, API Reference, and Testing sections.","README.md includes at least 3 parseDuration(input) examples.","docs/API.md documents supported units: s, m, h.","docs/API.md states invalid input returns null.","npm test passes.","npm run docs:contract passes."],"prd_markdown":"# PRD: parseDuration(input) Documentation Update

## Goal
Update documentation for `parseDuration(input)` so README.md and docs/API.md accurately describe installation, usage, API behavior, testing, supported units, examples, and invalid input handling.

## Scope
Prefer documentation-only changes in README.md and docs/API.md. Production code in src/duration.js is already correct and should only be inspected if documentation or contract validation requires clarification.

## Required README Content
- Installation section
- Usage section
- API Reference section
- Testing section
- At least 3 examples for `parseDuration(input)`, such as seconds, minutes, and hours inputs

## Required API Documentation
- `parseDuration(input)` supports `s`, `m`, and `h` units
- Invalid input returns `null`

## Validation
Run `npm test` and `npm run docs:contract` after documentation updates.","risks":["docs:contract may enforce exact headings or phrases, so scripts/check-docs-contract.js should be checked before editing.","Existing documentation may contain stale examples that need careful replacement without changing unrelated content.","src/duration.js should remain unchanged unless validation reveals the docs are inconsistent with actual behavior."],"status":"PASS","tasks":[{"acceptance_criteria":["README.md has Installation, Usage, API Reference, and Testing sections.","README.md includes at least 3 parseDuration(input) examples covering supported units.","docs/API.md describes supported units s, m, h.","docs/API.md states invalid input returns null.","npm test passes.","npm run docs:contract passes."],"description":"Update README.md and docs/API.md to document parseDuration(input), including installation, usage, API behavior, examples, testing instructions, supported units, and invalid input behavior. Inspect src/duration.js and scripts/check-docs-contract.js only as needed to align documentation with implementation and contract expectations.","id":"DOCS-001","likely_files":["README.md","docs/API.md","src/duration.js","scripts/check-docs-contract.js"],"title":"Document parseDuration(input) API and examples","validation_commands":["npm test","npm run docs:contract"]}]}
